meta.title: Richard Weitz on the U.S. Afghan Withdrawal for the BBC
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Political-Military Analysis Richard Weitz discusses President Obama's plan to withdraw troops from Afghanistan on the BBC
